titleStmt.title: SII 22.290A: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 290A. (A.R. No. 290-A of 1906)

summary.p: This is engraved in continuation of No. 290 above, and is dated in the 27th year of the same king. It registers a tax-free sale of 1969 kuḻi and odd of land situated in Śiṟṟiyāṟṟūr in Puriśai-nāḍu a division of Maṇaiyiṟ-kōṭṭam which is said to be a dēvadāna of the temple at Tirumālpēṟu by the temple authorities for a consideration of 10 kāśu received by them from the same donor mentioned above, who endowed it back to the temple for the formation of a flower-garden in his name.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ittevarkki yāṇṭirupatteḻāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattut tāmaṟkoṭṭattu vallanā
ṭayār tirumālppeṟuṭaiyār Ātidāsacaṇḍeśvarar nilavilaiāvaṇak kaiy yeḻuttu coḻamaṇṭalattu kaḷūr
turāntakavaḷanāṭṭu viṟaikkūṟṟattup paṭṭikuṭiyil paṭṭikuṭaiyāṉ tumpan maturān=takatevanāna kulottuṅkacoḻa viṟaināṭṭu mu
ventaveḷāṉ Uṭaiyār tirumālppeṟuṭaiyāṟkuc ceyvitta maturāntaka tevan tirunantavanappuṟamāka nilavilai koṇṭu yiṟaiiḻicciṉa mukkāṇi nāṭṭom paṇ
ṭārattoṭukkina kācu pattu Ikkācu pattum nilavilaiyu miṟaivilaiyumākak koṇṭu viṟṟa nilamāvatu Ittevar tevatānam maṇaiyiṟko
ṭṭattup puricaināṭṭuc ciṟṟiāṟṟūril vighneśvaravatikkuk kiḻakku Iraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mātaricaṭṭan Ettamum kāḷi mukkayanum kaḷḷiviḷā
kamum tenmelaikkuṇṭilikaḷumākak kuḻi Āyirattut toḷāyirattu Aṟupat tonpate yiraṇṭumāvum tirunan=tavanappuṟamāka mekkāla
mum nilavilaiyu miṟaivilaiyumākak koṇṭu Iṟaiyiliyāka vilaiāvaṇañ ceytukuṭutten Ātidāsa caṇḍesvaranen Ippaṭik
kut tirumālp peṟuṭaiyāriṉ tiruvārātanai paṇṇum śivabrāhmaṇan kauśikan Iṣabhavāhana bhaṭṭanen Ivai En neḻuttu Ippaṭikku

En ṉeḻuttu Ivvilaippaṭiye Iṟaiiḻicci viṟṟu vilaiyā
vaṇañ ceytukuṭutten cen=tamaṅkalamuṭaiyān paṇṭi
tamuccayanen Ivai En neḻuttu Ippaṭi viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇa
ñ ceytu kuṭutten kopparaiyan ceṭṭi vāḻavan=tānen I
vai En neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai rājentracoḻat tāmaṟ
koṭṭamuven=taveḷāneḻuttu Ippaṭikkup ponnuḻān ke
ḷān kaṇavati Eḻuttu Ivai kopparaiya neḻuttu Ippaṭi
viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭutten ponnuḻān [ devan] kuṭi
tāṅkiāna rājentracoḻat tāmaṟkoṭṭa muven=taveḷā neḻuttu Ippaṭi vi
ṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭutteṉ nocci kiḻān Oṟṟi Ekāmpara nāna tennavan cikā
maṇimuven=taveḷā neḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.290A by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
